workLog.action: Reproduced 3 RED CI checks locally on PR #2658 head (7d712aaee1): Run Python Tests, Agent Drift Detection, Validate PR.
Full pytest surfaced 5 real failures: 3x test_adr_063 status (Proposed->Accepted), test_check_plugin_manifest_parity (version skew), test_check_skill_portability (ratchet).

ADR-063 status tests: updated TestDraftStatusTriggersReview->TestAcceptedStatus to track the maintainer-accepted ADR (commit f21c8d4ad7 by rjmurillo, 2026-06-17). Deliberate behavior change per working-with-legacy-code.md, not test silencing.

Manifest parity: bumped src/copilot-cli/.claude-plugin/plugin.json 0.5.205->0.5.206 to match .claude canonical (the PR bumped only one mirror). Fixes manifest-parity drift sub-check AND test_check_plugin_manifest_parity.

Agent Drift: ran build/scripts/build_all.py to regenerate the Copilot CLI vendored mirror the PR omitted (src/copilot-cli/skills/memory-search/ created; src/copilot-cli/skills/memory/SKILL.md updated). Generation is idempotent (second run = no new diff).

Portability ratchet (#2050): ran check_skill_portability.py --update-baseline. Records memory-search test at 1 intrinsic delegation-path ref + ratchets 4 pre-existing improvements down. All tightening direction.

Validate PR: pr_description.py flagged 5 reference paths as phantom change-claims. Edited PR body to silence via sanctioned mechanisms (Out-of-Scope prefix heading, ## Validation H2, drop inline reference path).
Verified: all 5 originally-failing tests pass; eval dry-run failure was induced by uncommitted working-tree state and resolves on commit.

nextSteps: Confirm CI green on PR #2658 after push: Run Python Tests, Agent Drift Detection, Validate PR.
